action.reasoning: Observation: 50 epochs of bigger model got R2_eval=0.5794, only slightly better than 20-epoch run (0.5748). Plateau by epoch ~38. Analysis: We're plateauing around 0.58 with current architecture. Need a different approach. The data has vertical structure (60 levels) — using 1D CNN or transformer along the vertical dimension would exploit this. Also ptend_q is the bottleneck. Let me submit eval to lock in best score, then try a vertical CNN/transformer architecture.
